stimulus.content: In 1492, Christopher Columbus sailed west from Spain. He hoped to find a quick sea route to Asia. Instead, he landed on islands in the Caribbean. His voyage opened the way for more Europeans to come to the Americas.

stem: What was the main goal of Columbus when he sailed west from Spain?

choices.text: To find a sea route to Asia
To start colonies in the Caribbean
To map the coast of Africa

answer_explanation: The passage states Columbus hoped to find a quick sea route to Asia. He did not set out to start colonies, map Africa, or trade with Native Americans.
